title: 10D/8N The Best of Sydney, Canberra & Melbourne Australia Experience Winter Season 2026
details: Experience Australia’s winter season with a scenic journey through Sydney, Canberra, and Melbourne. Enjoy city tours, nature adventures, wildlife encounters, snow experience at Mt. Buller, iconic attractions, and comfortable hotel stays with guided tours.

itinerary.day_details: Meet at NAIA Terminal 1 for airline check-in. Enjoy in-flight amenities, meals, and entertainment onboard. Flight PR211 Manila to Sydney 22:10 PM – 09:45 AM.

Arrival in Sydney. Meet tour coach and guide at the airport. Proceed with Sydney City Tour including Historic Rocks Area, Sydney Opera House (view), Conservatorium of Music, Hyde Park, St. Mary’s Cathedral (photo stop), Parliament House, Art Gallery of NSW, Royal Botanic Garden, Sydney Town Hall, Sydney Tower, Darling Harbour, Macquarie’s Chair, and Bondi Beach (if time permits). Enjoy Sydney Harbour Lunch Cruise. Dinner and overnight in Sydney.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/oceania/10D/9N The Best of Sydney, Canberra & Melbourne Australia Experience Winter Season 2026/Day2_1769582269.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 03: Blue Mountains & Featherdale Wildlife Park (B/L/D)
itinerary.day_details: Breakfast at hotel. Visit the World Heritage-listed Blue Mountains, see the Three Sisters Rock Formation. Experience Scenic World including Scenic Railway, Skyway, and Cableway. In the afternoon, visit Featherdale Wildlife Park to see Australian native animals. Return to hotel for dinner and overnight.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/oceania/10D/9N The Best of Sydney, Canberra & Melbourne Australia Experience Winter Season 2026/Day3_1769582281.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 04: Sealife Aquarium & Madame Tussauds / Birkenhead Factory Outlet (B/L)
itinerary.day_details: Breakfast at hotel. Visit Sealife Aquarium and Madame Tussauds located in Darling Harbour. Afternoon shopping at Birkenhead Factory Outlet, home to over 120 brands. Return to hotel for overnight.

After breakfast, hotel check-out and drive approximately 3 hours to Canberra. Half-day Canberra City Tour including Mount Ainslie lookout, Parliament House, Australian War Memorial, and Yarralumla Embassy District. Hotel check-in, dinner, and overnight in Canberra.
After breakfast, hotel check-out and transfer to Melbourne (approximately 6 hours and 30 minutes). Lunch en route at own expense. Arrival in Melbourne, hotel check-in, and buffet dinner.

Breakfast at hotel. Full-day Melbourne City Tour featuring Lygon Street, Melbourne University, Royal Exhibition Building & Museum, Parliament House, Princess Theatre, St. Patrick’s Cathedral (photo stop), Captain Cook’s Cottage (own expense), Fitzroy Gardens, East Melbourne Victorian houses, Flinders Street Station, Federation Square, Hosier Lane, ACDC Lane, and Brighton Beach Boxes. Return to hotel after the tour.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/oceania/10D/9N The Best of Sydney, Canberra & Melbourne Australia Experience Winter Season 2026/Day7_1769582339.png

itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, proceed to Mt. Buller Alpine Resort. Stop at Mansfield if guests wish to rent snow equipment (own expense). Enjoy snow activities, sightseeing, and free exploration. Skiing, gondola rides, and snow gear rentals are optional and not included. Return to hotel for dinner and overnight.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/oceania/10D/9N The Best of Sydney, Canberra & Melbourne Australia Experience Winter Season 2026/Day8_1769582316.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 09: Yarra Valley + Puffing Billy + Winery + Chocolate (B/L/D)
itinerary.day_details: Breakfast at hotel. Drive through the picturesque Dandenong Ranges. Ride the Puffing Billy steam train and visit the museum. Proceed to Yarra Valley for wine tasting at Rochford Winery and visit Yarra Valley Chocolaterie for complimentary chocolate tasting. Return to hotel for dinner and overnight.
Breakfast at hotel. Enjoy free time for shopping or personal leisure activities.
Early morning check-out. Box breakfast will be distributed. Transfer to Melbourne Airport for departure back to Manila. Flight PR210 Melbourne to Manila 08:00 AM – 13:35 PM. Home sweet home.

inclusions: Fully loaded tours as per itinerary
Admissions: Scenic World (Railway, Skyway & Cableway), Sealife Aquarium, Madame Tussauds, Puffing Billy Train
exclusions: Mandatory tipping for guide and driver: $90 ($10 per person per day)
extra_details: Full cancellation charges apply for cancellations made 30 days before departure.
Rebooking allowed only for force majeure or government restrictions.
Subject to hotel and airline availability.
Full payment required 45 days before travel date.
Itinerary is subject to change without prior notice due to local circumstances.
